steps.title: State the values claim
steps.content: Brenner and colleagues propose that values are a luxury good: as income rises, people have more freedom to let values guide voting. The passage applies this idea to high-income voters who support higher taxes.

steps.title: Avoid added political claims
steps.content: Choice A says income makes values more likely to conflict with interests, which overstates the claim. Choice B says moral values coincide with material interests, but the passage says they may conflict. Choice C discusses campaign strategy, not the economists' idea. The answer is D.
